who.title: Who
who.bodytext: All Massachusetts residents can use MAPLE to fulfill their civic responsibility to our state democracy.

when.title: When
when.bodytext: MAPLE welcomes testimony at any time, but we recommend submitting it before the scheduled hearing date for the greatest impact. Hearing dates are listed on the bill pages of this website.

how.title: How
how.bodytext: We help you craft your testimony, publish it to the community, and send it directly to the right legislators.

why.title: Why
why.bodytext: Your voice is important; we help amplify it. We make the Massachusetts' legislature's testimony process more accessible and transparent.

what.title: What
what.bodytext: MAPLE makes it easy to submit testimony and see testimony submitted by others.

hero.title: Your Voice Matters
hero.body: MAPLE makes it easy for anyone to submit and see testimony to the Massachusetts Legislature about the bills that will shape our future.

didYouKnow.title: Did You Know?
didYouKnow.submit: Anyone can submit testimony to the MA legislature.
didYouKnow.deadline: Testimony can be generally be submitted up until the hearing date.
didYouKnow.legislators: Legislators value personal stories and information regarding their constituents.

explainer.title: What does MAPLE do?
explainer.body: MAPLE makes it easy to engage with the Massachusetts Legislature. Research bills, read diverse perspectives, and submit your own testimony to ensure your voice is heard.

features.title: Features
features.research: Explore bills and policy changes on topics that matter to you. Search by keyword, committee, or legislator.
features.publish: Share your perspective directly with the State House. Submit written testimony to make your voice part of the legislative process.
features.share: Read testimony from organizations and constituents across the Commonwealth to get informed on the issues of the day.

hearings.title: Upcoming Hearings
hearings.logoAlt: MAPLE Massachusetts Platform for Legislative Engagement logo
